TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tjusinlung = Gaga mniq Pingtung Sucusyang ka alang Tjusinlung. 89 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 264 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 259 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan92%, Bunun2%, Amis2%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = tɟusinluŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ suʦusjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟusinluŋ. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, bunun*%, amis*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjusinlung = Gaga mniq Pingtung Sucusyang ka alang Tjusinlung. 89 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 264 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 259 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan92%, Bunun2%, Amis2%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = tɟusinluŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ suʦusjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟusinluŋ. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, bunun*%, amis*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
